sessions.episode: How I Met Your Mother - S01E19  Mary the Paralegal
dialogues: a complete train wreck totally.
It's, um... it's Par...
Have you two been looking at a lot of places
and add a landing spot.
And that turns it off.
If you never get a black light, you'll be so happy here.
and he was honestly kind of a vag after that.
And that the Superman films are uneven.
If I get blinded in one eye by a badminton shuttlecock,
And I think you'll agree it was worth the wait
koreanHints: 3. 한쪽 눈이 배드민턴 셔틀콕에 맞아서 실명하면,
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- a complete train wreck : 완전히 엉망진창인 상황이나 사람을 묘사할 때 쓰는 생생한 구어 표현. 기차 사고처럼 처참하다는 뉘앙스
- have been looking at : 현재완료 진행형으로 최근까지 계속해서 뭔가를 알아보고 있었다는 의미. 집, 차 등을 '둘러보다'는 look at을 자주 사용
- get blinded : 눈이 멀다, 실명하다는 의미의 자연스러운 표현. go blind보다 외부 요인에 의한 경우에 적합
- in one eye : 한쪽 눈에, 한쪽 눈만. 신체 부위 특정할 때 쓰는 전치사 in 활용

sessions.episode: Friends - S08E15  The One with the Birthing Video
dialogues: Hi. I'm sorry to barge in on your Valentine.
{Y:i}I came to the big city to become a star.
Oh, man, I'm sorry. Why?
But I can't do anything about it.
- Then talk to him. - I don't know.
Or, something to remember me by.
Interestingly, it isn't made with seawater...
So this guy she used to go out with, is he still in love with her?
- It's horrible! - I know, I know! I'm so sorry for you!
Except all I did was think about it.
koreanHints: 3. 내가 한 거라곤 그것만 생각한 게 다였어.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- barge in on : 초대받지 않고 불쑥 끼어들다, 난입하다. 무례하게 방해한다는 뉘앙스가 있어서 사과할 때 자주 씁니다.
- can't do anything about it : 어쩔 도리가 없다, 손쓸 방법이 없다. 상황을 바꿀 수 없을 때 쓰는 체념의 표현입니다.
- all I did was : 내가 한 거라곤 고작 ~뿐이다. 다른 건 안 하고 오직 그것만 했다는 강조 표현입니다.
- except : 문두에 쓰여 '단지, 다만'의 의미로 앞 내용을 제한하거나 반전시킬 때 사용합니다.

sessions.episode: Friends - S04E13  The One with Rachel's Crush
dialogues: You used to have carpet.
So, you been doing this long?
And she'll go, "No, no, no. It's Chandler. " He'll go, "Whatever. Ha-ha-ha. "
You know what? I don't know how comfortable I am...
...and make kissing noises.
You can't eat our food anymore. That gravy train has ended.
...then all the sexual tension between them is gone.
...and then they're gonna go to their cast parties, and he's gonna undermine me.
Yeah, just something I picked up.
Oh, how was Kathy's play?
koreanHints: 2. 이제 우리 음식 못 먹어. 그 꿀 떨어졌어.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- You been doing this long? : 현재완료 회화체로 Have를 생략한 형태. "이거 한 지 오래됐어요?"라는 자연스러운 질문. 처음 만난 사람에게 경력이나 경험을 물을 때 자주 씀
- gravy train has ended : 쉽게 얻던 이득이나 혜택이 끝났다는 관용구. gravy train은 "노력 없이 얻는 돈이나 혜택"을 의미
- how comfortable I am : "얼마나 편한지/괜찮은지 모르겠다"는 완곡한 거절이나 망설임 표현. 직접적 거절을 피하면서 불편함을 전달할 때 씀

sessions.episode: Modern Family - S07E02  The Day Alex Left for College
dialogues: Don't turn it into an insult.
Look at my conscientious little girl
sanitized fifth-grade production of "rent"
I am a coach, damn it.
Okay, well, when I'm with a bereaved client, say,
Just finish the thought.
I can't believe I'm saying this, once again,
So I hear my dad had a little accident?
The deal's in the bag, kid.
Wasn't daddy supposed to be driving you to our game?
koreanHints: 3. 아빠가 우리 경기에 태워다주기로 하지 않았어?
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- turn something into something : 어떤 것을 다른 것으로 변질시키거나 바꿔버리다. 중립적이거나 긍정적인 상황을 부정적으로 해석하거나 전환할 때 자주 사용
- finish the thought : 말하다가 멈춘 생각을 끝까지 이어서 말하라는 표현. 상대방이 말을 흐리거나 중간에 멈출 때 사용
- be supposed to : 원래 예정되어 있었거나 기대되었던 일을 나타냄. 과거형으로 쓰면 지켜지지 않은 약속이나 계획을 암시
